creator: ilya.zhuravel@gmail.com
text:
When trying to install freeBSD 8.0 on ESX server 3.5 after selecting any loader option i get an error BTX halted.

I also get some kind of memory dump.
Could it be connected to bios settings or is it my virtual machine or even HW (Intel XEON 64 bit). 

Please he-e-e-e-elp.

Sincerely yours,
Ilya Zhuravel

Fix: 

Googled alot but haven't found any specific answer why this happens.
How-To-Repeat: Install an installation DVD and press 1. If you see "BTX halted" exception you've got the same problem.
